execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len()
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    if n == 0
      print("")
    else
      if n <= 3
        println("#{line} -> short")
      else if n <= 7
        println("#{line} -> medium")
      else
        println("#{line} -> long")
      end
    end
  when None
    print("")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
